arguments.name: panic_retreat_and_block
arguments.description: Emergency survival action for low health: sprint directly away from the nearest hostile while facing/checking it, avoid allied players, place available blocks such as planks between the bot and hostiles when they are within 3 blocks, continue until at least 12 blocks of separation is reached or the short time limit expires, and do not stop to attack or eat during the retreat.

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created panic_retreat_and_block and executed it with {"preferredDistanceBlocks":12,"retreatDistanceBlocks":12,"maxDurationTicks":140,"minimumHealth":1,"hostileSearchRadiusBlocks":32,"placeBlocksWhenWithinBlocks":3,"blockItemNames":["oak_planks","cobblestone","dirt"],"maxBlocksToPlace":6,"avoidPlayers":true,"playerAvoidRadiusBlocks":4,"replanIntervalTicks":8}. <STARTED>: Emergency retreat started from hostile at 0.4 blocks.
